# Data Protection and Privacy Act, 2019

Jurisdiction: Uganda
Region: UG
Citation: Data Protection and Privacy Act, 2019
Authority: Personal Data Protection Office Uganda
Source URL: https://www.pdpo.go.ug/data-protection-and-privacy-act-2019/
Topics: notice_transparency, consent, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, security_breach, accountability
Keywords: Uganda Data Protection and Privacy Act, PDPO, personal data

## Summary
Uganda data protection and privacy law with principles, rights, controller obligations, security, and office oversight.

## Key compliance obligations
- Register or comply with PDPO requirements where applicable.
- Provide notices and rights mechanisms.
- Maintain security and accountability controls.
